name: 5-Minute Quickie
description: No excuses — a fast full-body wake-up in 5 minutes

exercises.name: Jumping Jack
instructions: Stand with feet together and arms at sides
Jump feet apart while raising arms overhead
exercises.formTip: Full range, arms overhead on each jump

exercises.name: Push Up
instructions: Start in high plank with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower your chest toward the floor
Push back up to starting position explosively
Keep body in a straight line throughout
exercises.formTip: Chest to floor, push up explosively

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Lower your body by bending knees and hips
Keep chest up and core engaged
Push through heels to return to standing

exercises.name: Plank
instructions: Place forearms on the ground with elbows under shoulders
Extend legs back and rise onto your toes
Keep body in a straight line from head to heels
exercises.formTip: Strong plank to finish — do not quit!
